issue.title: Normalize welcome copy names
issue.body: Welcome emails have inconsistent handling for names with extra spaces. Standardize the subject and body so the display name is stripped and title-cased everywhere, without changing the existing punctuation.

comments.author: support
comments.body: A customer reported `  ada lovelace ` showing up raw in the message body.

behavioral_assertions: message body uses the same normalized display name

blockers: Did not update the message body path.
transcript: legacy mock: focused on the formatter and missed the second call site

plan: Use it from both the subject and message body.
transcript: pi mock: traced both subject and body paths before editing
